overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City at dusk. The journey traverses downtown skyscraper canyons and industrial zones, featuring neon signage, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture under a moonlit sky.

agents.ego_description: driving straight through downtown streets between tall buildings

entered.detail: futuristic skyscraper with illuminated 'CYBER' signage near the top
large yellow construction crane attached to building facade
concrete elevated highway structure with support columns
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a downtown canyon of futuristic skyscrapers, passing a building with a prominent illuminated 'CYBER' sign and construction cranes. The street features palm trees on the right and an elevated highway ramp in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic signals and industrial backdrop

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light behind a white van
vehicle executes a right turn at the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopping at a red light behind a white van, then turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: white van stopped at red light ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red then green
low industrial structure with smokestacks emitting smoke
elevated monorail or train track structure with supports
tall modern street lamps with horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the vehicle stops behind a white van at a red traffic light. After the light changes, the vehicle turns right, revealing industrial buildings with smokestacks and elevated train tracks on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic advertising and power infrastructure

events.description: passing large circular holographic billboard structure on the left

agents.ego_description: driving forward past commercial buildings and a prominent circular holographic display

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with rotating holographic advertisements
bright full moon visible in the dusky sky
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
low-rise industrial buildings with flat roofs

segments.scene_description: Driving past a massive circular holographic billboard displaying advertisements, with the full moon becoming visible in the open sky. The area features industrial warehouses, power transmission towers, and palm trees lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial thoroughfare with power infrastructure and warehouses

events.description: vehicle makes a left turn at intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through industrial district and executing a left turn at the final intersection

entered.detail: massive industrial complex with illuminated windows and smokestacks in the distance
two-story wooden structure with illuminated windows
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: Continuing through an industrial area with large power transmission towers and a massive industrial complex visible ahead. The vehicle maintains a steady pace before making a left turn at the final intersection, passing a wooden building on the left while the moon remains visible in the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from the neon-lit canyons of a futuristic downtown into a sprawling, moonlit industrial district. It begins by gliding past towering skyscrapers and construction cranes, passing an illuminated CYBER sign and palm trees beneath an elevated highway ramp. As the vehicle reaches a major intersection and pauses behind a white van, the scene shifts upon a right turn toward a landscape of smokestacks and elevated train tracks. The camera then moves past a massive circular holographic billboard as the sky opens up to reveal a full moon, guiding the way through a corridor of warehouses and power transmission towers. Finally, the journey proceeds toward a massive industrial complex before turning left past a wooden building under the steady glow of the night sky.
